attributes.name: [Azure Activity Logs OTel] Administrative operation latency 99.5% rolling 30 days
attributes.description: This SLO tracks the average duration of Azure Resource Manager administrative operations via Activity Logs, ensuring that 99.5% of 1-minute time intervals show average operation duration below 3 seconds over a rolling 30-day period. Elevated durations may indicate ARM throttling, resource provider degradation, or complex deployment bottlenecks.

params.filter: data_stream.dataset: "azure.activity.otel" and azure.category: "Administrative" and not (azure.result.type: "Start" or azure.result.type: "Started")
